# Tool Policy

## Allowlisted skills

- `nexusctl_acceptance` — Submit business-domain acceptance verdicts.
- `nexusctl_feature_request_ops` — Create and inspect cross-domain feature requests.
- `nexusctl_goal_ops` — Read, measure, and evaluate goal definitions.

## Granted Nexusctl capabilities

- `acceptance.submit`
- `feature_request.create`
- `feature_request.read`
- `goal.evaluate`
- `goal.read`
- `runtime.tool.invoke`
- `schedule.run`
- `system.status.read`
- `trading.strategy.mutate`

## Prohibitions

- Do not use direct GitHub write credentials.
- Do not directly apply repository changes.
- Do not edit files under `generated/*` manually.
